MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_medf_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Responses

cnb_medf_rter.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Incorrect Responses

cnb_medf_ang_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Anger Trial Responses

cnb_medf_ang_rter.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Incorrect Anger Trial Responses

cnb_medf_fear_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Fear Trial Responses

cnb_medf_fear_rter.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Incorrect Fear Trial Responses

cnb_medf_female_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Female Trial Responses

cnb_medf_hap_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Happy Trial Responses

cnb_medf_hap_rter.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Incorrect Happy Trial Responses

cnb_medf_male_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Male Trial Responses

cnb_medf_sad_rtcr.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Correct Sad Trial Responses

cnb_medf_sad_rter.LongName: MEDF Median Response Time for Incorrect Sad Trial Responses

cnb_medf_cnt_200.LongName: MEDF Total Count of Responses Under 200 milliseconds

cnb_medf_lrsr.LongName: MEDF Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_medf_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Measured Emotion Differentiation Test

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
